app.title: GMCAuto
app.subtitle: GMC PASS Auto-Application
app.unofficial: This service is not an official service of Hankuk Academy of Foreign Studies. It is a student-developed service running on an external server.
app.securityWarning: Please use a different password for going.hafs.hs.kr than you use on other websites.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.viaAkademiya: Signs in via Akademiya using your school Google account.

ak.descSub: After linking your going.hafs.hs.kr credentials once, you will be signed in automatically.
ak.descSub2: Existing GMCAuto users will retain their scheduled times automatically when linking via student number.
ak.hafsOnly: Only accounts enrolled in the HAFS organization on Akademiya can use this.
ak.verifyFailed: Code verification failed. Please try again.
ak.relink: Automatic login failed with the saved password. Please re-enter your password.
ak.linkDesc: Enter your going.hafs.hs.kr credentials to link. Afterward, Akademiya login will be automatic.

home.registerDesc: Once registered, the server will automatically submit GMC PASS at this time on every day it's allowed (weekdays, excluding holidays/suspension periods) (1 per minute)
home.slotTaken: This time slot is already taken by another user
home.quickDesc: Submit a GMC PASS application immediately
home.suspendNotice: 🚫 GMC PASS is suspended. Auto-application will resume from ({{date}}).
home.holidayNotice: 📅 Today is Friday/a holiday, so no application will run. Next available date: {{date}}

install.iosTitle: To receive push notifications on {{device}}, you need to add this site to your Home Screen via Safari.
install.iosNotSafari: ⚠️ You are not using Safari. Please open this page in Safari.
install.iosIpadStep2: Tap the Share button (□↑) next to the address bar
install.iosStep2: Tap the ··· button to the right of the address bar
install.iosStep5: Select Add to Home Screen at the bottom of the list
install.iosStep6: Launch GMCAuto from your Home Screen and allow notifications
install.androidTitle: Install the app on Android to receive push notifications.
install.androidStep2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right corner
install.androidStep3: Select Add to Home screen or Install app
install.androidStep4: Launch the installed app and allow notifications
install.pcTitle: Install the app on your PC to receive push notifications.
install.pcStep1: Open gmc.akademiya.kr in Chrome or Edge
install.pcStep2: Click the Install (📥) icon in the address bar
install.pcStep3: Or go to the browser menu and select Install app
install.pcStep4: Launch the installed app and allow notifications

users.title: 👥 User Permission Management
users.countLabel: Users with permissions ({{count}}) — role 0 users are excluded

suspend.title: 🚫 GMC PASS Suspension Period
suspend.invalidRange: End date cannot be earlier than start date.

account.title: Account Settings
account.credentialsTitle: Update Going HAFS Student No. / Password
account.credentialsDesc: If your student number changed or you updated your password, re-link it here.
account.developerDesc: Turn on developer mode to issue GMCAuto API keys.

developer.keysDesc: Manage API keys for server-to-server integration.
developer.regenerateWarning: Regenerating will immediately invalidate the old secret.
developer.deleteConfirmDesc: Once deleted, this key can no longer call the API.
developer.secretModalWarning: This secret is shown only once. Please copy it somewhere safe.
developer.keySecretLabel: API Key (use as-is in the X-Api-Key header)
